verbGlossary.EXCAVATED PER: {source} are tracked against {target} entry for the excavator or backhoe on site that day
verbGlossary.RECORDED IN: {source} activity is documented as free-text narrative in {target} by the superintendent
verbGlossary.COMPACTED PER: Fill material placed for backfill and grading is verified against {target} entries measuring lift thickness and compaction passes
verbGlossary.PUMPED VIA: {source} operation is logged through {target} entry tracking pump run-hours and discharge volume
verbGlossary.INSPECTED UNDER: {source} measures such as silt fence and inlet protection are verified through {target} entry
verbGlossary.DRIVEN PER: {source} driving or drilling activity is documented in {target} recording blow counts, tip elevation, and refusal depth
verbGlossary.POURED PER: {source} placement rate is captured in {target} entry measuring cubic yards placed per hour
verbGlossary.FORMED PER: {source} forming and stripping activities are summarized in a construction report entry for the day
verbGlossary.PLACED PER: {source} placement is scheduled as a planned activity in a scheduled work log entry for {target} coordination
verbGlossary.FINISHED PER: {source}-on-grade flatness and finish quality metrics are tracked in a field productivity record against specification tolerances
verbGlossary.APPLIED PER: {source} application is verified through {target} entry before backfill proceeds
verbGlossary.PRESSURE TESTED VIA: {source}are hydrostatically pressure tested and results are documented in {target} entry
verbGlossary.LAID BY: {source} installation {target} size and hours are tracked through a manpower log entry for the plumbing subcontractor
verbGlossary.GRADED PER: {source} inverts and slope are measured against {target} entries recording linear feet installed at specified grades
verbGlossary.FLAGGED ON: {source}generates {target} log entry when hot work or excavation procedures are not followed
verbGlossary.DELAYED ON: {source} is attributed to a specific cause in {target} entry such as utility company no-show or permit hold
verbGlossary.ERECTED VIA: {source} placement by crane or other lifting equipment is tracked through {target} entry
verbGlossary.SET BY: {source} setting {target} composition and headcount are recorded in a manpower log entry for the steel erector
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source} placement volumes are captured in an actual production quantity record against the pour plan
verbGlossary.CITED DURING: {source} structure work at height generates {target} log entries for fall protection or guardrail deficiencies
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED IN: {source} installation is ordered as a scheduled work log entry to maintain vertical access for follow-on trades
verbGlossary.RECEIVED PER: {source}are checked in through {target} entry verifying shop drawing compliance on arrival
verbGlossary.REVISED ON: {source} layout or detail changes are distributed to the field via a plan revision receipt triggering re-measurement
verbGlossary.DELIVERED FOR: {source} units arriving on site are documented in {target} entry with count, size, and condition noted
verbGlossary.ACCEPTED VIA: {source}s are inspected and formally accepted through a material receipt record checking hardware, finish, and rating label
verbGlossary.WEATHER HELD ON: {source} veneer installation is suspended and recorded in {target} entry when temperature drops below mortar-set minimums
verbGlossary.HOISTED VIA: {source} lifts are recorded in {target} entry tracking crane picks, rigging, and placement sequence
verbGlossary.ADHERED PER: Air and moisture barrier application continuity and lap dimensions are verified through {target} entry
verbGlossary.BOARDED PER: {source} installation square footage is tallied in {target} entry for progress measurement
verbGlossary.RAIN DELAYED ON: {source} installation is halted and logged in {target} entry when precipitation prevents adhesion or welding
verbGlossary.TARGETED IN: {source} planned coverage area per shift is established in a budgeted production quantity record
verbGlossary.DETAILED IN: Flashing installation locations, material types, and termination details are described in {target}
verbGlossary.TESTED VIA: {source} is water-tested and results are documented in {target} entry before close-in
verbGlossary.SHIPPED FOR: {source} units are tracked from fabricator to jobsite through a material shipment record with delivery ETA
verbGlossary.HUNG PER: {source}work hanging rate in linear feet or pounds per hour is captured in {target} entry
verbGlossary.BRAZED BY: HVAC piping brazing and soldering {target} composition is tracked in a manpower log entry for the mechanical subcontractor
verbGlossary.RIGGED VIA: {source} unit setting with crane or forklift is recorded in {target} entry documenting rigging plan execution
verbGlossary.BACK ORDERED ON: {source}delivery delay is documented in {target} entry attributing schedule impact to supply chain shortage
verbGlossary.WRAPPED PER: {source} installation hours are captured on {target} entry for the insulation subcontractor's labor
verbGlossary.CALIBRATED PER: {source} calibration and setpoint verification are documented in {target} during commissioning
verbGlossary.BALANCED PER: {source} results are recorded in a field productivity record tracking airflow readings against design CFM
verbGlossary.FLUSHED PER: {source} flushing and disinfection procedure is documented in {target} entry before occupancy
verbGlossary.ROUGHED IN PER: Waste and vent rough-in progress is captured in {target} entry measuring joints completed per shift
verbGlossary.LEAK TESTED ON: {source}test failure or improper purge procedure generates {target} log entry
verbGlossary.TRIMMED PER: {source} trim-out installation is linked to a CPM schedule activity through a scheduled work task link
verbGlossary.INSULATED PER: {source} installation labor hours are tracked on {target} entry for the mechanical insulation crew
verbGlossary.ENERGIZED PER: {source} energization sequence is witnessed and documented in {target} entry
verbGlossary.PULLED BY: Branch wiring {target} pulling cable through conduit is tracked by headcount in a manpower log entry for the electrical subcontractor
verbGlossary.RUN PER: {source} linear footage installed is recorded in {target} entry for electrical rough-in progress
verbGlossary.LAMPED PER: {source} installation count per shift is captured in an actual production quantity record
verbGlossary.TRANSFER TESTED VIA: Emergency power automatic transfer switch operation is witnessed and documented in {target} entry
verbGlossary.MEGGERED PER: {source} resistance megger test results are recorded in {target}
verbGlossary.THREADED BY: {source} threading and assembly {target} size is tracked in a manpower log entry for the fire protection subcontractor
verbGlossary.COUNTED IN: {source} head installation quantities by floor or zone are tallied in {target} entry for fire protection progress
verbGlossary.HYDRO TESTED VIA: {source} hydrostatic test at required PSI is documented in {target} entry before concealment
verbGlossary.FLOW TESTED PER: {source} flow test and pressure curve results are documented in {target} as part of acceptance testing
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONED PER: {source}-by-device commissioning is scheduled and tracked as a scheduled work log entry
verbGlossary.HUNG AND TAPED PER: {source} hanging and finishing quantities per shift are recorded in an actual production quantity record
verbGlossary.GRIDDED PER: {source} installation is tracked as a planned activity in a scheduled work log entry
verbGlossary.HUMIDITY HELD ON: {source}is suspended and documented in {target} entry when humidity exceeds product specifications
verbGlossary.GROUTED PER: {source} installation and grouting output rate is tracked in a field productivity record measuring square feet per shift
verbGlossary.SCRAPPED INTO: {source} cutoff waste is recorded in {target} entry by material type and weight
verbGlossary.UNCRATED PER: {source} are documented in {target} entry verifying piece count and finish condition
verbGlossary.TEMPLATED FOR: Countertop field dimensions are verified and units are tracked from fabrication through a material shipment record
verbGlossary.LOAD TESTED VIA: {source} car load test and safety device verification are documented in {target} entry
verbGlossary.ALIGNED VIA: {source} machinery alignment and leveling procedure is documented in {target} entry during installation
verbGlossary.TEMP HELD ON: {source} operations are suspended and recorded in {target} entry when ambient temperature falls below asphalt laydown minimums
verbGlossary.SCREEDED PER: {source} placement and screed finish quantities are measured in {target} entry
verbGlossary.SECURED PER: {source} and site security are confirmed as part of {target} header for each work day
